config.name: SDC_USE_SYNCHRONIZATION
config.brief: Support for blocking SDC transfer APIs.

config.name: SDC_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p sdc_configurations of type @p sdc_configurations_t.

config.name: SDC_INIT_RETRY
config.brief: Number of initialization attempts before rejecting a card.

config.name: SDC_NICE_WAITING
config.brief: Insert small waits in polling loops.

config.name: SDC_INIT_OCR_V20
config.brief: OCR initialization constant for SD V2.0 cards.

config.name: SDC_INIT_OCR
config.brief: OCR initialization constant for non-V2.0 cards.

macro.name: sdcIsCardInserted
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

macro.name: sdcIsWriteProtected
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

macro.name: _sdc_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up the thread waiting for transfer completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

macro.name: _sdc_wakeup_isr
macro.brief: Wakes up the thread waiting for transfer completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

macro.name: _sdc_isr_complete_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code for successful transfer completion.
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

macro.name: _sdc_isr_error_code
macro.brief: Common ISR code for transfer errors.
macro.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_sdc_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an SDC driver.

typedef.name: hal_sdc_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an SDC configuration.

typedef.name: SDCDriver
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an SDC driver (legacy).

typedef.name: SDCConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an SDC configuration (legacy).

types.verbatim:
#define SDC_CONNECTING (HAL_DRV_STATE_ERROR + 1U) #define SDC_DISCONNECTING (HAL_DRV_STATE_ERROR + 2U) #define SDC_READING (HAL_DRV_STATE_ERROR + 3U) #define SDC_WRITING (HAL_DRV_STATE_ERROR + 4U) #define SDC_SYNCING (HAL_DRV_STATE_ERROR + 5U)
/* Inclusion of LLD header.*/ #include "hal_sdc_lld.h"

field.name: bus_width
field.brief: Data bus width to be used after card initialization.

field.name: slowdown
field.brief: Additional divider value applied to the bus clock.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ sdc_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

method.implementation: return sdcIsCardInserted(self);
return sdcIsWriteProtected(self);
return sdcConnect(self);
return sdcDisconnect(self);
return sdcSync(self);
return sdcGetInfo(self, bdip);

field.name: cardmode
field.brief: Various flags describing the attached card.

field.name: capacity
field.brief: Card capacity expressed in logical blocks.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ sdc_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: sdcConnect
sdcDisconnect
method.brief: Brings the driver in a state safe for card removal.

method.name: sdcStartRead
method.brief: Starts an asynchronous block read operation.

method.name: sdcStartWrite
method.brief: Starts an asynchronous block write operation.

method.name: sdcStopTransfer
sdcSynchronizeS
sdcSynchronize
sdcRead
method.brief: Reads one or more logical blocks.

method.name: sdcWrite
method.brief: Writes one or more logical blocks.

method.name: sdcGetAndClearErrors
method.brief: Gets and clears the cached driver errors.

method.name: sdcSync
method.brief: Waits for the card to become idle.

method.name: sdcGetInfo
sdcErase
method.brief: Erases a range of logical blocks.

method.name: sdcGetErrorsX
method.brief: Returns the cached SDC error flags.
method.implementation: return self->errors;

method.name: sdcGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached SDC error flags.
method.param: Mask of error flags to be returned and cleared.

method.implementation: return (const void *)sdc_lld_setcfg(self, (const hal_sdc_config_t *)config);
return (const void *)sdc_lld_selcfg(self, cfgnum);
sdc_lld_set_callback(self, cb);

types.verbatim: #if !defined(__DOXYGEN__) #if STM32_SDC_USE_SDMMC1 extern hal_sdc_driver_c SDCD1; #endif #if STM32_SDC_USE_SDMMC2 extern hal_sdc_driver_c SDCD2; #endif #endif

function.name: sdc_r1_error
function.brief: Checks if a response contains R1 error bits.

function.name: sdc_get_slice
function.brief: Extracts a bit slice from a CSD/CID image.

function.name: sdc_get_capacity
function.brief: Extracts the card capacity from a CSD record.
function.return: The card capacity in logical blocks.

function.name: sdc_get_capacity_ext
function.brief: Extracts the card capacity from an MMC EXT_CSD record.
function.return: The card capacity in logical blocks.

function.name: sdc_mode_detect
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_mmc_init
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_sd_init
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_mmc_cmd6_construct
sdc_sd_cmd6_construct
sdc_sd_cmd6_extract_info
function.brief: Extracts information from an SD CMD6 reply.

function.name: sdc_sd_cmd6_check_status
function.brief: Checks the status bits in an SD CMD6 reply.

function.name: sdc_detect_bus_clk
function.brief: Detects and selects the best supported data clock.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_set_bus_width
function.brief: Switches an SD card to the configured bus width.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_mmc_set_bus_width
function.brief: Switches an MMC card to the configured bus width.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: _sdc_wait_for_transfer_state
function.brief: Waits for the card transfer state.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: _sdc_wait_for_transfer_state_nocrc
function.brief: Waits for the card transfer state ignoring CRC in the status command.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_sync_read_aligned
function.brief: Performs a synchronous aligned block read.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.

function.name: sdc_sync_write_aligned
function.brief: Performs a synchronous aligned block write.
function.param: Pointer to the SDC driver instance.
